settings.html: <style>.siconart-atc .single_add_to_cart_button { margin-bottom: 16px !important; } .siconart-atc form.cart { margin-bottom: 8px !important; } .siconart-atc #ppc-button, .siconart-atc .ppc-button-wrapper, .siconart-atc [id*=paypal], .siconart-atc .ppcp-messages { margin-top: 12px !important; } .siconart-badge { transition: all 0.3s ease !important; cursor: default; } .siconart-badge:hover { transform: translateY(-3px) !important; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(82,58,39,0.1) !important; border-color: #A67146 !important; } .woocommerce-message { background: #FEF9EF !important; border: 1px solid #EBDACD !important; border-left: 4px solid #A67146 !important; border-radius: 10px !important; padding: 16px 20px !important; color: #523A27 !important; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 1.6 !important; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(82,58,39,0.06) !important; margin-bottom: 16px !important; display: flex !important; align-items: center !important; flex-wrap: wrap !important; gap: 12px !important; } .woocommerce-message::before { color: #A67146 !important; font-size: 20px !important; margin-right: 8px !important; position: static !important; top: auto !important; } .woocommerce-message .button.wc-forward { background: #523A27 !important; color: #FFFFFF !important; border: none !important; border-radius: 8px !important; padding: 8px 20px !important; font-family: Roboto, sans-serif !important; font-weight: 600 !important; font-size: 13px !important; text-transform: uppercase !important; letter-spacing: 0.5px !important; transition: all 0.3s ease !important; order: 2 !important; margin-left: auto !important; float: none !important; } .woocommerce-message .button.wc-forward:hover { background: #A67146 !important; } .woocommerce-error { background: #FDF2F2 !important; border: 1px solid #F5C6C6 !important; border-left: 4px solid #C0392B !important; border-radius: 10px !important; padding: 16px 20px !important; color: #523A27 !important; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(192,57,43,0.06) !important; list-style: none !important; margin-bottom: 16px !important; } .woocommerce-error::before { color: #C0392B !important; font-size: 20px !important; } .woocommerce-error li { margin-bottom: 4px !important; } .woocommerce-info { background: #FEF9EF !important; border: 1px solid #EBDACD !important; border-left: 4px solid #D4A574 !important; border-radius: 10px !important; padding: 16px 20px !important; color: #523A27 !important; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(82,58,39,0.06) !important; margin-bottom: 16px !important; } .woocommerce-info::before { color: #D4A574 !important; font-size: 20px !important; } .woocommerce-info .button.wc-forward { background: #523A27 !important; color: #FFFFFF !important; border: none !important; border-radius: 8px !important; padding: 8px 20px !important; font-family: Roboto, sans-serif !important; font-weight: 600 !important; font-size: 13px !important; transition: all 0.3s ease !important; float: none !important; } .woocommerce-info .button.wc-forward:hover { background: #A67146 !important; } .wc-block-components-notice-banner.is-success { background: #FEF9EF !important; border: 1px solid #EBDACD !important; border-left: 4px solid #A67146 !important; border-radius: 10px !important; padding: 16px 20px !important; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif !important; color: #523A27 !important; } .wc-block-components-notice-banner.is-error { background: #FDF2F2 !important; border: 1px solid #F5C6C6 !important; border-left: 4px solid #C0392B !important; border-radius: 10px !important; padding: 16px 20px !important; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif !important; color: #523A27 !important; } .wc-block-components-notice-banner.is-info { background: #FEF9EF !important; border: 1px solid #EBDACD !important; border-left: 4px solid #D4A574 !important; border-radius: 10px !important; padding: 16px 20px !important; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif !important; color: #523A27 !important; }</style>

settings.editor: Explore more handcrafted Chinese art brushes from our collection
We craft custom Chinese art brushes for artists, studios, and wholesale buyers. Share your requirements and we will create the perfect brush for you.
